known_issues: Images load slowly and sometimes display as 'image unavailable'; user wants images preloaded before swipe/at initial site open.

existing_features.title: Preload landing-page images at initial site open (before the user swipes) so carousel and transformation images are already in the browser cache.
Make image loading more resilient so intermittent failures do not get stuck showing 'Image unavailable' and can recover automatically.

new_feature_requests.summary: Improve image loading performance: preload images on initial page load and prevent 'image unavailable' errors (e.g., caching/lazy-load strategy adjustments).
Optimize the static image assets used by the landing page to reduce total bytes while keeping all existing image URLs unchanged.

projectName: Preload landing page images on first load and reduce 'Image unavailable' errors
